creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Hello,

Please re-open this PR, ports/117860 is not the correct patch.

On Tue, Nov 06, 2007 at 09:33:28AM +0000, linimon@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] databases/memcachedb: update to 0.1.0
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: linimon
> State-Changed-When: Tue Nov 6 09:33:15 UTC 2007
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Duplicate of ports/117860.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=117861
